response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms or direct exposure to capital markets/fixed income domains, despite claiming C++ in a bachelor’s thesis context; their professional work is overwhelmingly in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web technologies with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or financial system development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot programming experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical education (workshops, talks)
Proven ability to deliver complex systems in distributed and high-throughput environments
concerns: No professional C++ development on Windows — only academic/thesis use mentioned
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server/Oracle exposure or financial data context
